name: steward-bridge
description: Steward Bridge — connect Claude to Steward ACS for tasks, memory, file locks, and error tracking

mcp_api_key.title: Steward ACS API Key
mcp_api_key.description: Your developer API key (starts with acs_dev_). Generate one from your ACS admin.

acs_url.title: ACS Server URL
acs_url.description: Your Steward ACS base URL, e.g. https://prod.stewardacs.xyz
